title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**About the job** 




 Delart is home to a team of world\\-class engineers and project leaders dedicated to developing the next generation of advanced networking technologies, consumer devices, and innovative technology solutions. Trusted by some of the world’s leading technology companies, we deliver highly scalable, mission\\-critical solutions that power both consumer and business applications globally. Since our founding in 2017, we have been at the forefront of designing cutting\\-edge networking, telecommunications, and consumer products, while driving end\\-to\\-end project execution and creating transformative technology applications.
 


 Overview
 
 Join our team as an impact\\-focused engineer where you will leverage your software engineering expertise to develop scalable and production\\-grade solutions across diverse platforms. Collaborating seamlessly with cross\\-functional product engineering teams, you will drive innovation and maximize impact for stakeholders and billions of users worldwide. Your role is critical in merging business needs with cutting\\-edge technology to create meaningful and transformative digital experiences.
 


 Responsibilities
 * Collaborate with product, design, operations, and infrastructure teams to build innovative application experiences.
* Develop reusable software components to interface with hyperscaler back\\-end platforms.
* Analyze and optimize code to enhance quality, efficiency, and performance.
* Lead complex technical or product initiatives and provide technical guidance to peers.
* Architect efficient and scalable systems for complex applications.
* Identify and address performance and scalability challenges.
* Work across multiple coding languages and technologies, ensuring robust and maintainable solutions.
* Establish ownership of components, features, or systems with comprehensive end\\-to\\-end understanding.


 Minimum Qualifications
 * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 7\\+ years of programming experience in a relevant language.
* Experience in building maintainable and testable code bases, including API design and unit testing.
* Proven ability to set technical direction for a team, drive consensus, and foster successful cross\\-functional partnerships.
* Experience with scripting languages such as Python, JavaScript, or Hack.
* Proficiency in programming languages like C, C\\+\\+, Java, Swift, or Kotlin.
* 5\\+ years of experience building large\\-scale applications or equivalent expertise.
* Proven track record in building and shipping high\\-quality, reliable software solutions.
* Experience enhancing quality through code reviews, testing, monitoring, and proactive improvements.


 Preferred Qualifications
 * Exposure to architectural patterns of large\\-scale software applications.
* Demonstrated project completion at large scope with high\\-quality outcomes.
* Ability to integrate AI tools to optimize workflows and drive measurable impact, such as efficiency gains and quality improvements.
* Ongoing development in AI skills, including prompt engineering, agent orchestration, and keeping abreast with emerging AI technologies.



**Benefits** 




 Delart provides competitive benefits and compensation across all regions where we operate. In the
 **United States** 
 , our benefits package includes premium PPO and HMO medical insurance, dental and vision coverage, flexible spending accounts (FSA), life insurance, short\\- and long\\-term disability insurance, a company\\-matched 401(k) plan, and a generous paid time off policy.
 



 Join us in shaping the future of technology. Apply today!
 



*Delart is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to fostering an inclusive workplace for all employees. We strictly prohibit discrimination or harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability, genetics, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other characteristic protected by law.*

title: Python Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Founded with a mission to revolutionize healthcare technology, TIGI HR is a leading provider of innovative SaaS solutions tailored for laboratory management, genetic testing, and clinical data processing. Our company is committed to delivering reliable, scalable, and secure software platforms that empower healthcare providers and laboratories worldwide. With a focus on cutting\\-edge technology and customer\\-centric development, TIGI HR strives to improve the efficiency and accuracy of healthcare services through our robust digital solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Backend Engineer with 4 to 5 years of professional experience in Python development to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and maintaining our healthcare\\-focused SaaS platform. Your expertise will contribute to building scalable, secure, and high\\-performance backend services that support laboratory operations and clinical data management. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in backend development, experience working with production\\-grade systems, and a passion for innovative healthcare technology solutions.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate should possess a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Demonstrated experience in Python development, particularly in building and maintaining backend services, is essential. Strong understanding of object\\-oriented programming principles, asynchronous programming, and RESTful API design is required. Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, containerization tools like Docker, and CI/CD pipelines will be advantageous. Candidates should also have experience working in regulated environments like healthcare, demonstrating an understanding of compliance and security standards.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and optimize backend services using Python, ensuring they are efficient, reliable, and scalable.
* Design, implement, and maintain RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless integration with internal and external systems.
* Manage databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL, and implement caching mechanisms using Redis to enhance system performance.
* Work collaboratively with QA, DevOps, and product teams to ensure the timely delivery of high\\-quality features and system updates.
* Improve backend system reliability, security, and performance by implementing best practices and conducting regular code reviews.
* Document technical specifications, API endpoints, and system architecture to facilitate maintenance and future development.
* Participate in troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving production issues promptly to minimize downtime.
* Stay updated with the latest industry trends and incorporate innovative solutions to enhance platform capabilities.


**Benefits**
 At TIGI HR, we value our employees and offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your professional and personal growth. Our benefits include competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and paid time off. We also provide opportunities for continuous learning and development, including access to training programs and certifications. Our flexible work environment promotes work\\-life balance, and we foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and recognition. Additionally, employees have access to wellness programs and other perks aimed at enhancing overall well\\-being.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 TIGI HR is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation and drives our success, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.

title: Software Engineer, Developer Experience
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Notion is the collaborative AI workspace where teams and agents think together. We're building one place where your knowledge, projects, meetings, and AI tools live side by side, so work is faster, clearer, and less fragmented. Millions of individuals, small teams, and large companies run their work on Notion.
   

  

 Notinos (our employees) are customer zero in bringing this future of work to life. We care about craft, building things that last, and the belief that great work is still fundamentally human. Our goal isn’t to ship the next feature. Each and every team of Notinos is working to set the standard for how humans work together in the AI era. From building a business’s system of record to making and managing AI agents to automating away the busy work, we care deeply about giving our customers more time for their life’s work.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Millions of people use Notion — and this number is increasing every day. That means millions of people trust us to deliver a fast, reliable, and secure experience, and we value this more than anything. We want to keep earning trust, while also continuing to amaze our users with the tools they can build in Notion. The Developer Experience team is responsible for architecting, implementing, and scaling the tools and frameworks that Notion developers use to build Notion. We are looking for engineers who are passionate about solving engineering productivity challenges, have deep empathy for other developers, and love to communicate with engineers. You don't need to have experience in this domain but willing to advocate for developer experience is the key.
   

  

 What You'll Achieve
   

  

* Collaborate with engineers across the company to deliver an industry\\-leading developer experience, along the way working deeply with tools like the TypeScript language server, lint tooling, and the Notion CLI to improve developers’ day to day experience.
* Work on the bleeding edge of tooling performance, researching and evaluating new tools and keeping up with new developments in the developer experience space in the JS ecosystem.
* Work deeply with GitHub and our CI systems to help ensure engineers can merge their code quickly and safely. We aim for all PR CI pipelines to finish within 15 minutes!
* Take ownership of our development environment and toolchain, and contribute to novel projects across the company to deliver impact.


 Skills You'll Need to Bring
   

  

* Over 8 years of hands\\-on software development experience, thriving in fast\\-paced and dynamic environments.
* A drive to make developers’ lives better: you have a strong interest in keeping engineers in their flow state through better tooling. You like to think critically about the workflows engineers use in their day to day work, finding bottlenecks and thinking outside of the box to find ways to pave a better golden path for engineers to follow.
* A focus on user experience: you bring care and craft to the user experience you build into your products. Your work emphasizes simplicity, supportability, and ease\\-of\\-use, and you communicate clearly with other teams and engineers to get feedback on where we can improve.
* Multitasker and present: you like interrupts especially if this is blocking engineers. You switch between your project work and day to day developer experience challenges.
* Interest in learning how things work: you love to learn how the tools you use work at a fundamental level. You get excited at the idea of digging into third\\-party source code to understand how they work and find new ways to use them.
* Pragmatic and business\\-oriented: You care about business impact and prioritize projects accordingly. You don't just go after cool stuff—you understand the balance between craft, speed, and the bottom line. To you, technologies and programming languages are about tradeoffs. You may be opinionated, but you're not ideological and can learn new technologies as you go.
* You don’t need to be an AI expert, but you’re curious and willing to adopt AI tools to work smarter and deliver better results.


 Nice To Haves
   

  

* Familiarity with TypeScript, especially in ways to keep it running smoothly in a large codebase.
* An interest in automated testing and familiarity with testing best practices.
* Past experience with React and common tooling like React Testing Library.
* Past experience on developer experience teams or related tools.


 By clicking “Submit Application”, I understand and agree that Notion and its affiliates and subsidiaries will collect and process my information in accordance with Notion’s Global Recruiting Privacy Policy.
   

  

 A Note on AI
   

  

 You don’t need deep AI expertise for every role, but we do expect every Notino to be intellectually curious, drawn to tinkering and discovery, and excited to use AI as a real collaborator in their work. For some roles, AI fluency is a core requirement — when that’s the case, we'll say so explicitly in the qualifications. People who thrive here don’t treat AI as a novelty. They use it to think better, and make their work easier for others to build on.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity \\& Accommodations
   

  

 We hire talented people from a wide range of backgrounds. If you’re excited about this role but don’t meet every bullet, we still encourage you to apply. Notion is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of any legally protected characteristic. Consistent with applicable law, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Notion provides reasonable accommodations during the application process; if you need one, please let your recruiter know.
   

  

 Notion is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate in hiring or any employment decision based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or other applicable legally protected characteristic. Notion considers qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law. Notion is also committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, please let your recruiter know.

title: AI Software Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 
 Parshu Tactical Defence Pvt Ltd is a defence technology company advancing India’s strategic capabilities under the Make in India initiative. The organization brings cutting\\-edge global defence technologies to India, adapts them to local operational needs, and manufactures them using indigenous components. Inspired by the symbolism of “Parshu” as strength, precision, and protection, the company is committed to innovation, excellence, and national security. Parshu Tactical Defence collaborates with global innovators and empowers local industries to deliver high\\-quality, reliable, and adaptable solutions for the Indian Armed Forces. The company aims to set new benchmarks in defence manufacturing and help position India as a global leader in this domain.
   

**Role Description** 
 As an AI Software Engineer at Parshu Tactical Defence Pvt Ltd, you will design, develop, and deploy AI\\-driven software solutions for defence and security applications. This full\\-time, on\\-site role, based in Delhi, India, involves building and optimizing machine learning models, integrating AI components into production\\-grade software systems, and ensuring robustness, scalability, and real\\-time performance. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams to translate operational defence requirements into technical specifications, implement algorithms for pattern recognition and decision support, and validate models using real\\-world data. Daily responsibilities include coding, testing, documentation, and code reviews, as well as collaborating on system architecture, model evaluation, and continuous improvement. You will also stay current with advances in AI and defence technologies to recommend enhancements and new capabilities.
   

**Qualifications**
  

* Strong foundation in Computer Science and Software Development, including data structures, algorithms, and proficiency in languages such as Python, C\\+\\+, or Java.
* Practical experience with Neural Networks and Pattern Recognition, including designing, training, and optimizing deep learning models.
* Hands\\-on expertise in Natural Language Processing (NLP), such as text classification, information extraction, and language modeling, is highly desirable.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Experience with machine learning frameworks and tools (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit\\-learn) and version control (e.g., Git).
* Ability to work with large, complex datasets and implement efficient data pipelines and model deployment workflows.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to work in a multidisciplinary, high\\-security, and mission\\-focused environment.
* Familiarity with defence, aerospace, or high\\-reliability systems, and an understanding of real\\-time or embedded constraints, is an advantage.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Alp Consulting Ltd. is a leading technology solutions provider dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable software products to clients across various industries. With a strong focus on quality, efficiency, and technological advancement, Alp Consulting Ltd. has established a reputation for excellence in software development, system integration, and digital transformation services. **About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Architect to join our dynamic team at Alp Consulting Ltd. Your responsibility will be to design, develop, test, and integrate complex software systems, ensuring they meet high standards of quality, performance, and scalability. You will serve as a technical leader, driving system architecture, fostering innovation, and mentoring junior engineers. This role offers an exciting opportunity to influence product development at a strategic level, work on cutting\\-edge technologies, and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions that align with our business objectives.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. You should have between 6 to 10 years of experience in software development, with a strong background in designing and architecting complex systems. Expertise in systems and network architecture, especially with Broadcom Network ASICs and silicon platforms such as XGS, DNX, Trident, and Jericho, is essential. You should have hands\\-on experience with multiple programming languages, development tools, and software design methodologies. A deep understanding of end\\-to\\-end software development lifecycle, testing strategies, and quality assurance processes is required. Excellent problem\\-solving, analytical, leadership, and communication skills are critical for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead multiple project teams, both internal and outsourced, across all phases of the software development lifecycle, including design, development, testing, and integration for complex products and platforms.
* Own and drive the system architecture, ensuring effective design, scalability, and seamless integration of software systems across multiple platforms.
* Manage and strengthen relationships with internal stakeholders and external development partners to ensure alignment and successful project delivery.
* Review system designs and project activities to ensure compliance with engineering standards, improve product quality, and mitigate risks.
* Provide technical leadership and domain expertise across cross\\-functional and cross\\-organizational initiatives to foster innovation and best practices.
* Evaluate emerging technologies and incorporate them into existing and new systems to enhance functionality and performance.
* Mentor and guide junior engineers, promoting technical growth, best practices, and a culture of continuous improvement within the team.
* Collaborate with product managers, engineers, and stakeholders to define system requirements and translate them into scalable technical solutions.
* Ensure rigorous testing and validation of systems, defining test strategies, debugging issues, and maintaining high\\-quality standards.


**Benefits**
 At Alp Consulting Ltd., we believe in investing in our employees' growth and well\\-being. We offer a competitive salary package complemented by comprehensive health insurance, retirement plans, and performance\\-based incentives. Our flexible work arrangements, including remote work options, enable a healthy work\\-life balance. Employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, including training programs, certifications, and industry conferences. We foster an inclusive and collaborative environment that encourages innovation, creativity, and professional development. Additionally, employees benefit from a range of wellness programs, employee engagement activities, and a supportive corporate culture committed to diversity and inclusion.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Alp Consulting Ltd. is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are proud to be an inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe that diverse perspectives and experiences drive innovation and excellence, and we are dedicated to fostering a workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to succeed.

title: ML Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading research accelerator based in San Francisco, California, dedicated to advancing frontier artificial intelligence research and supporting global enterprises in deploying sophisticated AI systems. As a trusted partner for organizations seeking to leverage AI for transformative impact, Turing specializes in accelerating research efforts by providing high\\-quality data, cutting\\-edge training pipelines, and access to top\\-tier AI researchers with expertise in coding, reasoning, STEM disciplines, multilinguality, multimodality, and autonomous agents. The company's mission is to bridge the gap between AI research and practical deployment, enabling clients to transition from proof\\-of\\-concept prototypes to reliable, proprietary AI solutions that deliver measurable business results and sustainable growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Machine Learning Engineers (MLE Bench) to join our team and contribute significantly to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects centered on real\\-world machine learning systems. This role involves working directly with production\\-grade ML codebases, developing and refining model training and evaluation pipelines, and ensuring deployment workflows are optimized for performance and reliability. The ideal candidate will possess a strong ability to bridge research and engineering, working intimately with models, datasets, and infrastructure in realistic ML environments. Your work will help assess and enhance the capabilities of advanced AI systems, ensuring they meet rigorous standards for correctness, robustness, and efficiency.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with research and engineering teams to support MLE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks on real\\-world ML codebases.
* Design, implement, and maintain model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines to facilitate benchmarking and validation processes.
* Prepare datasets, features, and metrics tailored for benchmarking and performance assessment of ML models.
* Debug, refactor, and optimize production\\-like ML systems to improve correctness, stability, and performance.
* Analyze model behavior, identify failure modes, and evaluate edge cases relevant to benchmark tasks to inform system improvements.
* Write clean, reproducible, and well\\-documented Python code adhering to best practices for ML workflows.
* Participate in code reviews to ensure high standards of code quality, maintainability, and scalability.
* Work closely with multidisciplinary teams to design challenging, real\\-world ML engineering tasks for comprehensive AI system evaluation.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience as a Machine Learning Engineer or Software Engineer with a focus on ML projects.
* Proficiency in Python, with extensive experience developing and managing ML workflows.
* Hands\\-on experience building, training, evaluating, and deploying ML models and inference pipelines.
* Strong understanding of core machine learning concepts, including supervised and unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, and optimization techniques.
* Experience working with popular ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, or equivalent.
* Ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex, real\\-world ML codebases effectively.
* Proven track record of writing readable, reusable, and maintainable production\\-quality code.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills with a focus on debugging and performance optimization.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing as a freelance Machine Learning Engineer offers the flexibility of a fully remote work environment, allowing you to work from anywhere. You will have the opportunity to contribute to cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies, gaining exposure to the latest advancements in AI technology. Additionally, you will be part of a dynamic community of talented professionals, working on challenging problems that push the boundaries of current AI capabilities. This role provides a flexible engagement model suited for professionals seeking to balance work and personal commitments while being at the forefront of AI innovation.

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. title: Dev Ops Engineer
description:
**About the Role** 




 The DevOps Engineer will be responsible for automating the building, testing, and deployment of software to ensure fast and reliable releases. This role involves managing CI/CD pipelines, provisioning and managing cloud or on\\-premises servers using Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and deploying and orchestrating applications using virtualization and containerization tools. The engineer will also be responsible for building observability dashboards, log systems, and defining alerts to catch performance bottlenecks and production downtime. Security protocols will be integrated directly into the deployment pipeline to ensure compliance with industry security frameworks. Collaboration with developers, quality assurance (QA), and IT operations will be crucial to resolve integration issues and optimize the software lifecycle.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Automate the building, testing, and deployment of software using CI/CD pipelines.
* Provision, scale, and manage cloud or on\\-premises servers using declarative configuration languages.
* Deploy and orchestrate applications using virtualization and containerization tools.
* Build observability dashboards, log systems, and define alerts to monitor system performance.
* Integrate security protocols into the deployment pipeline to ensure compliance with industry security frameworks.
* Collaborate with developers, QA, and IT operations to resolve integration issues and optimize the software lifecycle.



**Requirements** 



* Deep familiarity with cloud environments like AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Proficiency with automation servers and orchestration tools like GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, or ArgoCD.

* Expertise in Docker and Kubernetes.
* Strong coding ability in languages like Python, Bash, or Ruby.
* Working knowledge of observability and logging stacks like Prometheus, Grafana, or Datadog.
* Excellent understanding of Git workflows.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with security protocols and compliance frameworks.
* Familiarity with microservices architecture.
* Knowledge of agile development methodologies.



**What We Offer** 



* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.
* A collaborative and inclusive work environment.



**Location \\& Work Mode** 



* This is a remote position.

title: .NET Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Boltin is a leading financial technology company specializing in innovative loan management solutions tailored to the diverse needs of the lending industry. Committed to excellence and technological advancement, Boltin provides comprehensive platforms that streamline loan servicing processes, enhance operational efficiency, and ensure regulatory compliance. Our mission is to empower financial institutions with cutting\\-edge tools that facilitate seamless loan lifecycle management, from origination to recovery. With a focus on continuous innovation, Boltin leverages the latest in software development and industry best practices to deliver scalable and reliable solutions that meet the evolving demands of the lending market.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer with a deep understanding of loan management and servicing platforms to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in developing and maintaining loan servicing modules on enterprise\\-level Loan Management System (LMS) platforms. This role involves designing, implementing, and optimizing complex loan processing functionalities, ensuring compliance with industry standards and regulatory requirements. The Senior Software Engineer will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to develop innovative features, troubleshoot issues, and improve existing systems to support Boltin's commitment to delivering exceptional loan servicing solutions. The position offers an excellent opportunity to work on large\\-scale projects that impact the financial services industry globally, particularly in consumer and commercial lending sectors.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* 8\\+ years of overall software development experience with 4\\+ years hands\\-on in loan management / loan servicing platforms
* Proven experience in developing loan servicing modules on enterprise LMS platforms
* Strong knowledge of consumer lending products such as personal loans, two\\-wheelers, auto loans, and home loans, as well as commercial lending including SME, LAP, equipment finance, and working capital
* Exposure to Australian vehicle and equipment finance—chattel mortgage, finance lease, hire purchase, and novated lease servicing
* Experience with settlement processing, payout figure calculation, and disbursement handling
* Expertise in building repayment schedule engines supporting EMI, P\\&I, balloon, interest\\-only, and irregular repayment structures
* Hands\\-on experience with payment processing systems including direct debit, ECS/NACH/auto\\-debit, with dishonour handling and retry logic
* Knowledge of arrears and overdue management, including automated dunning, escalation, and hardship variation processes
* Familiarity with collections workflows such as bucket\\-wise staging, field collections, legal referral, and enforcement tracking
* Understanding of NPA classification, repossession, asset surrender, and security enforcement procedures
* Experience with write\\-off processes, provisioning, deficiency balance management, and recovery posting
* Knowledge of charge and hypothecation registration, search, and release processes
* Proficiency in regulatory reporting, credit bureau integration, and maintaining compliance\\-driven audit trails


**Responsibilities**
 The Senior Software Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust loan management modules within Boltin’s enterprise LMS platform. Key responsibilities include implementing features related to loan origination, servicing, and recovery, ensuring they adhere to industry standards and regulatory requirements. The role involves collaborating with product managers, business analysts, and other development teams to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
   

  

 Specific duties include developing and optimizing repayment schedule engines supporting various repayment structures, integrating payment processing systems, and automating arrears and overdue management workflows. The engineer will also be involved in implementing collections workflows, legal and enforcement tracking, and asset management functionalities such as repossession and security enforcement.
   

  

 Additionally, the candidate will work on regulatory compliance features, including reporting, credit bureau integration, and audit trail management. Troubleshooting, bug fixing, and performance tuning of existing modules will be ongoing tasks to ensure high system reliability and efficiency. The role also requires staying updated with industry best practices and emerging technologies to continuously improve the platform’s capabilities.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Boltin, we recognize the importance of fostering a supportive and rewarding work environment. Our employees enjoy competitive compensation packages, comprehensive health insurance, and opportunities for professional development. We promote work\\-life balance through flexible working arrangements and encourage continuous learning with access to training resources and industry conferences. Boltin also offers a collaborative work culture that values innovation, diversity, and inclusion, providing employees with a platform to grow their careers and make meaningful contributions to the financial technology sector.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Boltin is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and dignity regardless of race, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe diversity enhances our innovation and success, and we strive to create a workplace that reflects the communities we serve.

title: Memory Design (ASIC) Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 
 Vicharak is redefining computing by developing reconfigurable hardware that adapts to software needs in real time, overcoming the limitations of traditional Von Neumann CPU architectures. The company focuses on creating consumer\\-ready Reconfigurable Computing platforms that deliver higher speed, efficiency, and true parallelism through multiple configurable hardware instances. By rethinking computing architectures, software paradigms, and hardware capabilities from the ground up, Vicharak aims to unlock new levels of performance for everyday applications. Team members have the opportunity to work on foundational technologies that push the boundaries of modern computer architecture and shape the next generation of computing systems.
   

**Role Description** 
 As a Memory Design (ASIC) Engineer at Vicharak, you will design, develop, and verify on\\-chip memory architectures and macros for next\\-generation reconfigurable computing platforms. This full\\-time, on\\-site role is based in Surat and involves close collaboration with architecture, RTL, and physical design teams to translate system requirements into robust, efficient memory subsystems. Your day\\-to\\-day work will include specifying memory requirements, modeling and implementing memory blocks, running simulations and verification, and optimizing for performance, area, and power. You will participate in timing closure, sign\\-off analysis, and silicon debug, ensuring that memory designs integrate seamlessly into complex ASICs. The role also involves contributing to design methodologies, documentation, and continuous improvement of internal flows and tools.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong Circuit Design and device\\-level understanding for robust, low\\-power, high\\-performance memory implementations.
* Solid Logic Design and Computer Architecture skills to define and optimize memory hierarchies, interfaces, and protocols.
* Proficiency in RTL Design (e.g., Verilog/SystemVerilog) for modeling memory controllers and related logic.
* Experience in Physical Design aspects of memory integration, including floorplanning, timing closure, and sign\\-off.
* Knowledge of ASIC design flows, verification methodologies, and tools (simulation, STA, formal verification).
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a cross\\-functional hardware team, with clear, concise communication.
* Experience with memory compilers, SRAM/ROM design, or prior tape\\-out experience is a strong plus.
* Familiarity with reconfigurable or parallel computing architectures is beneficial.
